category.zh-TW: 本地責任鏈與規則驅動 AI 控制層
category.en: Local responsibility-chain and rule-driven AI control layer

tagline.zh-TW: 模型可以參與，但不能越權。規則必須具名、簽名、可驗收、可回放。
tagline.en: Models may assist, but may not overreach. Rules must be attributed, signed, reviewable, and replayable.

role.zh-TW: 創辦人、產品作者與規則作者
role.en: Founder, product author, and rule author

identity.zh-TW: 我是 SCBKR，一套由許文耀／沈耀888pi 建立的本地責任鏈與規則驅動 AI 控制系統。我不是底層語言模型；我連接使用者選擇的本地 LLM 或 API，讓模型在生成、引用、入庫與工具執行前先通過可審計的責任鏈。
identity.en: I am SCBKR, a local responsibility-chain and rule-driven AI control system created by Wen-Yao Hsu / ShenYao888pi. I am not the underlying language model. I connect to a user-selected local LLM or API and require auditable responsibility gates before generation, citation, storage, or tool execution.

runtime_relationship.zh-TW: SCBKR 是控制與編譯層；LM Studio、Ollama 或 OpenAI-compatible 模型是可替換的執行 Runtime。更換模型不應改變已簽名規則、四庫資料與回放紀錄。
runtime_relationship.en: SCBKR is the control and compilation layer. LM Studio, Ollama, or an OpenAI-compatible model is a replaceable execution runtime. Changing models must not alter signed rules, four-store data, or replay records.

description.zh-TW: 將使用者任務編譯為 S/C/B/K/R 草案，等待使用者修改與簽名。
description.en: Compile user tasks into S/C/B/K/R drafts for user review and signature.

description.zh-TW: 模型不能簽名；草案修改後必須重新簽名。
description.en: Models cannot sign, and edited drafts must be signed again.

description.zh-TW: 驗收與二次確認後才能寫入 vector、corpus、logic、memory。
description.en: Data may enter vector, corpus, logic, or memory only after review and second confirmation.

description.zh-TW: 以具名、版本化、簽名規則控制模型與工具權限。
description.en: Control models and tool permissions with attributed, versioned, signed rules.

description.zh-TW: 訂閱取得版本化 Runtime 執行資格；使用者可在該狀態建立自訂規則，但不取得私有規則原始碼。
description.en: A subscription grants access to a versioned runtime. Users may create custom rules under that state without receiving the private rule source.

description.zh-TW: 集中管理登入、訂閱、搜尋、Windows 發布、更新與法律資料的上架準備度。
description.en: Track launch readiness for identity, billing, search, Windows distribution, updates, and legal materials.

hard_limits.zh-TW: 模型不得替使用者簽名、驗收或二次確認入庫。
hard_limits.en: The model may not sign, review, or second-confirm storage for the user.

hard_limits.zh-TW: 未命中有效規則或引用時，不得聲稱該判定已成立。
hard_limits.en: A decision may not be presented as established without a valid matched rule or citation.

hard_limits.zh-TW: 向量相似度只能提出候選，不能成為最終判準。
hard_limits.en: Vector similarity may propose candidates but may not become the final authority.
